zh.lifeSummary: 當Maria Schaefer於大約1579年出生在德國時，她的父親Hans Scheffer30歲，母親Rosina Kern30歲。她於1608年8月22日與Lorentz Kieffer在德國爾特波格比格奧頓豪森結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.Karlsruhe, Republic of Baden, Germany: 德国巴登可萊斯 卡爾茲盧
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Maria Schaefer于大约1579年出生在德国时，她的父亲Hans Scheffer30岁，母亲Rosina Kern30岁。她于1608年8月22日与Lorentz Kieffer在德国爾特波格比格奧頓豪森结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Schaefer
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Erwin, Ernst, Hans, Gerhard, Helmut, Dieter, Wolfgang, Hermann, Horst, Manfred.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäfer): occupational name for a shepherd, from an agent derivative of German Schaf, Middle High German schāf ‘sheep’. It is also found in Hungary and Czechia. Compare Schafer and Schaffer 2.

variants.name: Schafer
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäfer): see Schaefer .

variants.name: Schiefer
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Manfred, Bernhard, Eberhard, Konrad, Otto, Ulrich, Wolfgang.

German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): metonymic occupational name for a roofer, from Middle High German schiver ‘splinter (stone or wood)’, Middle Low German schiver ‘slate, shingle’, German Schiefer ‘slate’.
German (Lower Rhine): variant of   Schaefer  .

variants.name: Schaper
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Armin, Hans, Juergen, Bernhardt, Erhardt, Horst, Jurgen, Klaus, Uwe.
North German (also Schäper): variant of Schaefer .

variants.name: Scheffert
meanings: German: variant of   Schaefer  .

variants.name: Shaefer
meanings: Americanized form of German and Jewish (Ashkenazic)   Schaefer   ‘shepherd’.

variants.name: Seper
meanings: Austrian German and Hungarian: variant of German Schäfer ‘shephard’ (see Schaefer ).

variants.name: Schaefers
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Bernd, Kurt.
North German and Dutch: patronymic from   Schaefer   1, i.e. ‘son of the shepherd’.

variants.name: Shafer
meanings: Americanized form of German Schäfer (see Schaefer ), Schäffer (see Schaffer 2) or Schaffer 1.
Americanized form of Hungarian Sáfár, Slovenian and Croatian Šafar or Šafer, Czech Šafář or Šafer, Slovak Šafár, in part cognates of 1 above (see Safar ).

variants.name: Shaver
meanings: Americanized form of German   Schaefer   ‘shepherd’.
Americanized form of Slovenian Šaver (see Saver ).
Americanized form of Dutch   Schaver   ‘carpenter’.

variants.name: Schaffer
meanings: German: occupational name for a steward or bailiff, from an agent derivative of Middle High German schaffen ‘to manage’. It is also found in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Hungary, Denmark, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia; see also 3 below.

South German and Jewish (Ashkenazic) (Schäffer): variant of Schäfer (see Schaefer ). It is also found in Hungary, Denmark, Czechia, Slovakia, and Slovenia. Compare Cheffer , Schaeffer , Shaeffer , Shafer , Shaffer , and Sheaffer .
Germanized form of Hungarian Sáfár, Slovenian and Croatian Šafar or Šafer, Czech Šafář or Šafer, Slovak Šafár, cognates of 1 above (see Safar ).

nameMeanings.name: Maria
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Maria  , of German origin but now also moderately popular in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Maria Schaefer was born about 1579, in Germany, her father, Hans Scheffer, was 30 and her mother, Rosina Kern, was 30. She married Lorentz Kieffer on 22 August 1608, in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Maria Schaefer est née environ 1579, à Allemagne, son père, Hans Scheffer, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Rosina Kern, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Lorentz Kieffer le 22 août 1608, à Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Maria Schaefer um 1579 in Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hans Scheffer 30 und ihre Mutter Rosina Kern 30. Sie hat am 22. August 1608 in Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Deutschland Lorentz Kieffer geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Schaefer è nata il circa 1579 nel Germania, sua padre, Hans Scheffer, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Rosina Kern, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Lorentz Kieffer il 22 agosto 1608, nel Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.Evangelisch, Ottenhausen, Schwarzwaldkre: ドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセン
ja.Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Schwarzwaldkreis: ドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセン
ja.Karlsruhe, Republic of Baden, Germany: ドイツバデンクレイス カルルスルヘ
ja.lifeSummary: Maria Schaeferが約1579年にドイツで生まれた時，父Hans Schefferは30歳，母Rosina Kernは30歳であった。1608年8月22日にドイツウuルッテンバーグネウエンブuルグオッテンハウセンでLorentz Kiefferと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Maria Schaefer(이)가 대략 1579년 독일에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hans Scheffer(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rosina Kern(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1608년 8월 22일 독일 wu르테버그 니우브u르그 오텐하우센에서 Lorentz Kieffer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Maria Schaefer nasceu aproximadamente 1579, em Alemanha, seu pai, Hans Scheffer, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Rosina Kern, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Lorentz Kieffer em 22 de agosto de 1608, em Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Maria Schaefer родилась около 1579 г. в местности Германия, её отцу по имени Hans Scheffer было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Rosina Kern, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Lorentz Kieffer 22 августа 1608 г. в местности оттенаусен, неуенбuрг, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Maria Schaefer nació aproximadamente 1579, en Alemania, su papá, Hans Scheffer, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Rosina Kern, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Lorentz Kieffer el 22 de agosto de 1608, en Ottenhausen, Neuenbürg, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
